tool_args.label: Joint LIRR and Metro-North Committees Meeting

payload.description: Regular Meeting Joint Long Island Rail Road and Metro-North Railroad Committees
Collapse of private retaining walls onto Metro-North Hudson Line near Scarborough Station, causing mudslide that knocked out all four tracks
Five Leaf Peeper trains operate on Saturdays and four on Sundays through November 5 on Metro-North

Remnants of Tropical Storm Ophelia; heavy rains caused key section of track in the Bronx to become completely submerged, affecting all three Metro-North lines and leading to temporary suspension of service to and from Grand Central for more than seven hours
LIRR and MTA C&D celebrated the 'all new' Mineola Station; building first opened its doors exactly 100 years ago on September 22, 1923

tool_args.label: Metro-North LaserTrain pilot of new technologies

payload.description: Metro-North piloting two new technologies on the LaserTrain: machine vision lidar system and a system to measure level of contamination on top of rail before and after cleaning

tool_args.label: NaviLens pilot at White Plains Station

payload.description: Metro-North pilot of NaviLens intelligent digital markers for visually impaired customers at White Plains Station; 50 QR-type codes installed for a 6-month pilot program
